scripts.test:page-position: node src/features/reader/pagePosition.test.mjs && node src/features/reader/hybridLayout.test.mjs && node src/features/reader/hybridAnnotations.test.mjs && node src/features/reader/readerToc.test.mjs && node src/features/reader/readerPaging.test.mjs && node src/features/reader/readerProgress.test.mjs && node src/features/reader/readerAnnotations.test.mjs && node src/features/reader/useNativePageControls.test.mjs && node src/features/library/libraryMetadata.test.mjs && node src/state/libraryAccess.test.mjs
scripts.check: npm run test:page-position && npm run build && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
